---
title: "Main-Text Validation Figures"
output: html_document
params:
  input_dir: "artifacts/manual/maintext_validation"
  data_root: "datas/data_01_seeg"
  runtime_hash: "97411c0ec4"
  output_dir: "artifacts/manual/maintext_validation"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
source("_common.R")

resolve_repo_path <- function(path, must_exist = TRUE) {
  if (is.null(path) || !nzchar(path)) {
    stop("A non-empty path parameter is required.")
  }
  is_absolute <- grepl("^[A-Za-z]:[/\\\\]|^/", path)
  candidates <- if (is_absolute) c(path) else c(path, file.path("..", path))
  if (must_exist) {
    for (candidate in candidates) {
      if (file.exists(candidate)) {
        return(normalizePath(candidate, winslash = "/", mustWork = TRUE))
      }
    }
    stop(paste("Could not resolve path:", path))
  }
  candidate <- candidates[[length(candidates)]]
  normalizePath(candidate, winslash = "/", mustWork = FALSE)
}

for (pkg in c("svglite", "ggdist", "ggtext", "paletteer", "patchwork", "reticulate")) {
  if (!requireNamespace(pkg, quietly = TRUE)) {
    stop(paste0("Missing required package '", pkg, "'. Install it with: install.packages('", pkg, "')"))
  }
}
if (!requireNamespace("ggseg", quietly = TRUE)) {
  stop("Missing required package 'ggseg'. Install it with: install.packages('ggseg', repos = 'https://cloud.r-project.org')")
}
if (!requireNamespace("ggsegYeo2011", quietly = TRUE)) {
  stop("Missing required package 'ggsegYeo2011'. Install it with: remotes::install_github('ggseg/ggsegYeo2011', upgrade = 'never')")
}

library(ggdist)
library(ggtext)
library(ggseg)
library(ggsegYeo2011)
library(paletteer)
library(patchwork)
library(reticulate)

reticulate::use_python(resolve_repo_path(file.path(".venv", "Scripts", "python.exe"), must_exist = TRUE), required = TRUE)

input_dir <- resolve_repo_path(params$input_dir, must_exist = TRUE)
output_dir <- ensure_output_dir(resolve_repo_path(params$output_dir, must_exist = FALSE))
runtime_hash <- params$runtime_hash
output_stem <- paste0("maintext_validation_", runtime_hash)

required_paths <- list(
  yeo17_summary = file.path(input_dir, paste0(output_stem, "_yeo17_coverage_summary.csv")),
  yeo17_long = file.path(input_dir, paste0(output_stem, "_yeo17_coverage_long.csv")),
  transition_group = file.path(input_dir, paste0(output_stem, "_field_state_transition_group.csv")),
  model_order_subject = file.path(input_dir, paste0(output_stem, "_field_state_model_order_subject.csv")),
  model_order_group = file.path(input_dir, paste0(output_stem, "_field_state_model_order_group.csv")),
  support_summary = file.path(input_dir, paste0(output_stem, "_archetype_support_summary.csv")),
  assignment_null_long = file.path(input_dir, paste0(output_stem, "_assignment_similarity_null_long.csv")),
  assignment_null_summary = file.path(input_dir, paste0(output_stem, "_assignment_similarity_null_summary.csv")),
  lag_curve = file.path(input_dir, paste0(output_stem, "_archetype_eeg_fine_lag_curve.csv")),
  subject_peaks = file.path(input_dir, paste0(output_stem, "_archetype_eeg_subject_peaks.csv")),
  topomap_values = file.path(input_dir, paste0(output_stem, "_conditioned_eeg_topomap_values.csv")),
  topomap_grid = file.path(input_dir, paste0(output_stem, "_conditioned_eeg_topomap_grid.csv")),
  representative_subjects = file.path(input_dir, paste0(output_stem, "_conditioned_eeg_representative_subjects.csv"))
)

missing_paths <- names(required_paths)[!file.exists(unlist(required_paths))]
if (length(missing_paths) > 0) {
  stop(paste(
    "Missing validation inputs:",
    paste(missing_paths, collapse = ", "),
    "Run scripts/export_maintext_validation_inputs.py first."
  ))
}

yeo17_summary <- read.csv(required_paths$yeo17_summary, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
yeo17_long <- read.csv(required_paths$yeo17_long, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
transition_group <- read.csv(required_paths$transition_group, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
model_order_subject <- read.csv(required_paths$model_order_subject, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
model_order_group <- read.csv(required_paths$model_order_group, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
support_summary <- read.csv(required_paths$support_summary, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
assignment_null_long <- read.csv(required_paths$assignment_null_long, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
assignment_null_summary <- read.csv(required_paths$assignment_null_summary, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
lag_curve <- read.csv(required_paths$lag_curve, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
subject_peaks <- read.csv(required_paths$subject_peaks, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
topomap_values <- read.csv(required_paths$topomap_values, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
topomap_grid <- read.csv(required_paths$topomap_grid, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
representative_subjects <- read.csv(required_paths$representative_subjects, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

archetype_levels <- c("A0 SM-SV", "A1 LB-SV", "A2 LB-DA", "A3 CT-DA")
yeo17_levels <- c(
  "VisCent", "VisPeri", "SomMotA", "SomMotB", "DorsAttnA", "DorsAttnB",
  "SalVentAttnA", "SalVentAttnB", "LimbicA", "LimbicB", "ContA", "ContB",
  "ContC", "DefaultA", "DefaultB", "DefaultC", "TempPar"
)

patient_levels <- yeo17_summary %>%
  arrange(desc(retained_bipolar_channels), patient_alias) %>%
  pull(patient_alias)

yeo17_summary <- yeo17_summary %>%
  mutate(
    patient_alias = factor(patient_alias, levels = rev(patient_levels)),
    retained_label = paste0(retained_bipolar_channels, " ch"),
    network_label = paste0(covered_yeo17_networks, "/17")
  )

yeo17_long <- yeo17_long %>%
  filter(network %in% yeo17_levels) %>%
  mutate(
    patient_alias = factor(patient_alias, levels = levels(yeo17_summary$patient_alias)),
    network = factor(network, levels = yeo17_levels),
    count_label = ifelse(n_bipolar_channels > 0, as.character(n_bipolar_channels), "")
  )

transition_group <- transition_group %>%
  mutate(
    from_label = factor(archetype_label(from_state), levels = rev(archetype_levels)),
    to_label = factor(archetype_label(to_state), levels = archetype_levels),
    transition_pct = mean_transition_probability * 100,
    transition_label = sprintf("%.1f%%", transition_pct)
  )

model_order_subject_long <- bind_rows(
  model_order_subject %>%
    transmute(patient_id, n_states, metric_label = "Template fit", value = mean_template_fit),
  model_order_subject %>%
    filter(!is.na(fit_gain_from_prev_k)) %>%
    transmute(patient_id, n_states, metric_label = "Gain from previous K", value = fit_gain_from_prev_k),
  model_order_subject %>%
    transmute(patient_id, n_states, metric_label = "Split-half stability", value = split_half_stability)
)

model_order_group_long <- bind_rows(
  model_order_group %>%
    transmute(n_states, retained_main_text_default, metric_label = "Template fit", value = mean_template_fit),
  model_order_group %>%
    filter(!is.na(mean_fit_gain_from_prev_k)) %>%
    transmute(n_states, retained_main_text_default, metric_label = "Gain from previous K", value = mean_fit_gain_from_prev_k),
  model_order_group %>%
    transmute(n_states, retained_main_text_default, metric_label = "Split-half stability", value = mean_split_half_stability)
)

metric_levels <- c("Template fit", "Gain from previous K", "Split-half stability")
model_order_subject_long <- model_order_subject_long %>%
  mutate(metric_label = factor(metric_label, levels = metric_levels))
model_order_group_long <- model_order_group_long %>%
  mutate(metric_label = factor(metric_label, levels = metric_levels))

support_summary <- support_summary %>%
  mutate(
    archetype_label = factor(archetype_label, levels = archetype_levels),
    support_label = paste0(n_subjects, "/20"),
    similarity_label = sprintf("mean %.3f", mean_similarity)
  )

assignment_null_long <- assignment_null_long %>%
  mutate(
    archetype_label = factor(archetype_label, levels = archetype_levels),
    source = factor(source, levels = c("null", "observed"))
  )

assignment_null_summary <- assignment_null_summary %>%
  mutate(
    archetype_label = factor(archetype_label, levels = archetype_levels),
    source = factor(source, levels = c("null", "observed"))
  )

lag_curve <- lag_curve %>%
  arrange(lag_ms) %>%
  mutate(
    mean_effect_x1000 = mean_effect * 1000,
    mean_observed_x1000 = mean_observed_coupling * 1000,
    mean_null_x1000 = mean_null_mean_coupling * 1000,
    q_flag = ifelse(q_fdr < 0.05, "FDR < 0.05", "n.s.")
  )

subject_peaks <- subject_peaks %>%
  mutate(
    patient_alias = factor(patient_alias, levels = sort(unique(patient_alias))),
    peak_effect_x1000 = peak_effect_mean_diff * 1000,
    peak_observed_x1000 = peak_observed_coupling * 1000,
    peak_null_x1000 = peak_null_mean_coupling * 1000
  )

representative_subjects <- representative_subjects %>%
  mutate(patient_alias = factor(patient_alias, levels = patient_alias))

panel_order <- topomap_values %>%
  distinct(patient_display, representative_rank) %>%
  arrange(representative_rank, patient_display) %>%
  pull(patient_display)

topomap_values <- topomap_values %>%
  mutate(
    patient_display = factor(patient_display, levels = panel_order),
    archetype_label = factor(archetype_label, levels = archetype_levels)
  )

topomap_grid <- topomap_grid %>%
  mutate(
    inside_head = as.logical(inside_head),
    patient_display = factor(patient_display, levels = panel_order),
    archetype_label = factor(archetype_label, levels = archetype_levels)
  )

group_topomap_values <- topomap_values %>% filter(patient_display == "Group")
group_topomap_grid <- topomap_grid %>% filter(patient_display == "Group")
representative_topomap_values <- topomap_values %>% filter(patient_display != "Group")
representative_topomap_grid <- topomap_grid %>% filter(patient_display != "Group")

bg_fill <- "#FBF7F1"
panel_fill <- "#FFFDF8"
grid_color <- "#E4DCCF"
ink_color <- "#1F2A33"
muted_color <- "#5B6670"
warm_mid <- "#D49A51"
warm_high <- "#7B2D26"
cool_low <- "#2166AC"
hot_high <- "#B2182B"
highlight_fill <- "#E7CDA3"

archetype_palette <- as.character(paletteer::paletteer_d("ggthemes::Tableau_10"))[c(1, 2, 3, 4)]
names(archetype_palette) <- archetype_levels

validation_theme <- function(base_size = 11) {
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_size) +
    theme(
      plot.background = element_rect(fill = bg_fill, color = NA),
      panel.background = element_rect(fill = panel_fill, color = NA),
      legend.background = element_rect(fill = bg_fill, color = NA),
      strip.background = element_rect(fill = "#EFE6D8", color = NA),
      strip.text = ggtext::element_markdown(face = "bold", color = ink_color, lineheight = 1.05),
      plot.title = element_blank(),
      plot.subtitle = element_blank(),
      axis.title = element_text(face = "bold", color = ink_color),
      axis.text = element_text(color = ink_color),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.major = element_line(color = grid_color, linewidth = 0.34),
      plot.margin = margin(10, 14, 10, 10),
      panel.spacing = grid::unit(0.9, "lines"),
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.title = element_text(face = "bold", color = ink_color),
      legend.text = element_text(color = ink_color),
      plot.tag = element_text(face = "bold", size = rel(1.2), color = ink_color)
    )
}

save_svg <- function(plot_obj, output_path, width = 8, height = 5) {
  ggplot2::ggsave(
    output_path,
    plot = plot_obj,
    width = width,
    height = height,
    device = svglite::svglite,
    bg = bg_fill
  )
  output_path
}

head_outline <- tibble(
  angle = seq(0, 2 * pi, length.out = 361),
  x = cos(angle),
  y = sin(angle)
)
nose_outline <- tibble(x = c(-0.09, 0, 0.09), y = c(0.98, 1.13, 0.98))
left_ear <- tibble(
  angle = seq(pi / 2, 3 * pi / 2, length.out = 80),
  x = -1.02 + 0.08 * cos(angle),
  y = 0.00 + 0.20 * sin(angle)
)
right_ear <- tibble(
  angle = seq(-pi / 2, pi / 2, length.out = 80),
  x = 1.02 + 0.08 * cos(angle),
  y = 0.00 + 0.20 * sin(angle)
)

topomap_limit <- max(abs(topomap_grid$value), na.rm = TRUE)
if (!is.finite(topomap_limit) || topomap_limit <= 0) {
  topomap_limit <- 1
}

build_topomap_plot <- function(grid_df, value_df, facet_formula, strip_text_size = 10) {
  ggplot() +
    geom_raster(
      data = filter(grid_df, inside_head),
      aes(x = x, y = y, fill = value),
      interpolate = TRUE
    ) +
    geom_contour(
      data = filter(grid_df, inside_head),
      aes(x = x, y = y, z = value),
      bins = 7,
      color = scales::alpha(ink_color, 0.30),
      linewidth = 0.18
    ) +
    geom_path(data = head_outline, aes(x = x, y = y), color = ink_color, linewidth = 0.55) +
    geom_path(data = nose_outline, aes(x = x, y = y), color = ink_color, linewidth = 0.55) +
    geom_path(data = left_ear, aes(x = x, y = y), color = ink_color, linewidth = 0.55) +
    geom_path(data = right_ear, aes(x = x, y = y), color = ink_color, linewidth = 0.55) +
    geom_point(
      data = value_df,
      aes(x = x, y = y),
      size = 1.25,
      color = ink_color,
      fill = panel_fill,
      shape = 21,
      stroke = 0.33
    ) +
    facet_grid(facet_formula, switch = "y") +
    coord_equal(xlim = c(-1.16, 1.16), ylim = c(-1.16, 1.16), clip = "off") +
    scale_fill_gradient2(
      low = cool_low,
      mid = "#F7F3EA",
      high = hot_high,
      midpoint = 0,
      limits = c(-topomap_limit, topomap_limit),
      oob = scales::squish,
      name = "Template\nloading"
    ) +
    labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
    theme_void(base_size = 10.4) +
    theme(
      plot.background = element_rect(fill = bg_fill, color = NA),
      panel.background = element_rect(fill = panel_fill, color = NA),
      legend.background = element_rect(fill = bg_fill, color = NA),
      strip.background = element_rect(fill = "#EFE6D8", color = NA),
      strip.text.x = ggtext::element_markdown(face = "bold", size = strip_text_size, color = ink_color),
      strip.text.y.left = ggtext::element_markdown(face = "bold", size = strip_text_size, color = ink_color, angle = 0),
      strip.placement = "outside",
      panel.spacing = grid::unit(0.45, "lines"),
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.title = element_text(face = "bold", color = ink_color),
      legend.text = element_text(color = ink_color),
      plot.margin = margin(8, 8, 8, 8)
    )
}

yeo17_count_plot <- ggplot(yeo17_summary, aes(x = retained_bipolar_channels, y = patient_alias)) +
  geom_segment(
    aes(x = 0, xend = retained_bipolar_channels, yend = patient_alias),
    color = grid_color,
    linewidth = 1.1,
    lineend = "round"
  ) +
  geom_point(
    aes(size = mapped_yeo17_bipolar_channels, fill = covered_yeo17_networks),
    shape = 21,
    color = ink_color,
    stroke = 0.35,
    alpha = 0.95
  ) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = retained_bipolar_channels),
    nudge_x = 4.5,
    color = ink_color,
    size = 3.0,
    hjust = 0
  ) +
  scale_size_continuous(name = "Mapped Yeo17\nbipolar channels", range = c(2.8, 8.5)) +
  scale_fill_gradient(
    name = "Covered Yeo17\nnetworks",
    low = "#F1E7D4",
    high = warm_high
  ) +
  labs(x = "Retained bipolar channels", y = "Patient") +
  expand_limits(x = max(yeo17_summary$retained_bipolar_channels) + 20) +
  validation_theme()

yeo17_heatmap <- ggplot(yeo17_long, aes(x = network, y = patient_alias, fill = coverage_pct)) +
  geom_tile(color = scales::alpha(grid_color, 0.8), linewidth = 0.45) +
  geom_text(aes(label = count_label), color = ink_color, size = 2.9) +
  coord_fixed() +
  scale_fill_gradient(
    low = "#F4EADC",
    high = warm_high,
    name = "Coverage (%)"
  ) +
  labs(x = "Yeo17 network", y = "Patient") +
  validation_theme() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = rel(0.84)),
    plot.margin = margin(10, 16, 10, 0)
  )

yeo17_combined <- yeo17_count_plot + yeo17_heatmap + plot_layout(widths = c(1.0, 2.25))

transition_plot <- ggplot(transition_group, aes(x = to_label, y = from_label, fill = transition_pct)) +
  geom_tile(color = scales::alpha(grid_color, 0.85), linewidth = 0.55) +
  geom_text(aes(label = transition_label), color = ink_color, size = 3.2) +
  coord_fixed() +
  scale_fill_gradient(
    low = "#F4EADC",
    high = warm_high,
    name = "Transition (%)"
  ) +
  labs(x = "To archetype", y = "From archetype") +
  validation_theme()

model_order_plot <- ggplot() +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 4, color = warm_high, linewidth = 0.6, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_line(
    data = model_order_subject_long,
    aes(x = n_states, y = value, group = patient_id),
    color = scales::alpha(muted_color, 0.45),
    linewidth = 0.4
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = model_order_subject_long,
    aes(x = n_states, y = value),
    color = scales::alpha(muted_color, 0.45),
    size = 0.9
  ) +
  geom_line(
    data = model_order_group_long,
    aes(x = n_states, y = value, color = metric_label),
    linewidth = 1.0,
    show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = model_order_group_long,
    aes(x = n_states, y = value, fill = retained_main_text_default),
    shape = 21,
    size = 2.4,
    color = ink_color,
    stroke = 0.32,
    show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(`TRUE` = highlight_fill, `FALSE` = panel_fill)) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = sort(unique(model_order_group_long$n_states))) +
  facet_wrap(~metric_label, nrow = 1, scales = "free_y") +
  labs(x = "Number of field states (K)", y = "Metric value") +
  validation_theme()

support_plot <- ggplot(support_summary, aes(x = archetype_label, y = n_subjects, fill = archetype_label)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.72, color = panel_fill, linewidth = 0.4) +
  geom_text(aes(label = support_label), vjust = -0.35, color = ink_color, size = 3.2) +
  geom_text(aes(label = similarity_label, y = n_subjects - 1.0), color = panel_fill, size = 3.0, fontface = "bold") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = archetype_palette, guide = "none") +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(0, 5, 10, 15, 20), limits = c(0, 21)) +
  labs(x = "Group archetype", y = "Supporting patients") +
  validation_theme()

assignment_null_plot <- ggplot() +
  ggdist::stat_halfeye(
    data = filter(assignment_null_long, source == "null"),
    aes(x = archetype_label, y = assignment_similarity, fill = archetype_label),
    adjust = 0.7,
    width = 0.65,
    slab_alpha = 0.82,
    justification = -0.22,
    point_colour = NA,
    show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = filter(assignment_null_long, source == "observed"),
    aes(x = archetype_label, y = assignment_similarity),
    position = position_jitter(width = 0.075, height = 0),
    color = scales::alpha(ink_color, 0.5),
    size = 1.5
  ) +
  geom_linerange(
    data = filter(assignment_null_summary, source == "observed"),
    aes(x = archetype_label, ymin = q05_similarity, ymax = q95_similarity),
    color = ink_color,
    linewidth = 0.8
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = filter(assignment_null_summary, source == "observed"),
    aes(x = archetype_label, y = mean_similarity),
    shape = 23,
    size = 2.9,
    fill = panel_fill,
    color = ink_color,
    stroke = 0.42
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = archetype_palette) +
  labs(x = "Group archetype", y = "Assignment similarity") +
  validation_theme()

field_state_reproducibility <- (
  transition_plot +
  model_order_plot +
  support_plot +
  assignment_null_plot
) +
  plot_layout(widths = c(1.0, 1.55), heights = c(1.0, 1.0)) +
  plot_annotation(theme = theme(plot.background = element_rect(fill = bg_fill, color = NA)))

lag_effect_plot <- ggplot(lag_curve, aes(x = lag_ms, y = mean_effect_x1000)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = grid_color, linewidth = 0.55) +
  geom_line(color = warm_high, linewidth = 1.0) +
  geom_point(aes(fill = q_flag), shape = 21, size = 2.7, color = ink_color, stroke = 0.28) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("FDR < 0.05" = highlight_fill, "n.s." = panel_fill), name = "Lag-wise test") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(-40, 40, by = 20)) +
  labs(x = "Lag (ms)", y = "Observed minus null coupling (x1000)") +
  validation_theme()

lag_overlay_plot <- lag_curve %>%
  select(lag_ms, mean_observed_x1000, mean_null_x1000) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(mean_observed_x1000, mean_null_x1000), names_to = "curve", values_to = "value") %>%
  mutate(curve = factor(curve, levels = c("mean_observed_x1000", "mean_null_x1000"), labels = c("Observed", "Null mean"))) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = lag_ms, y = value, color = curve)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.0) +
  geom_point(size = 2.0) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Observed" = warm_high, "Null mean" = cool_low), name = NULL) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(-40, 40, by = 20)) +
  labs(x = "Lag (ms)", y = "Mean coupling (x1000)") +
  validation_theme()

peak_lag_plot <- ggplot(subject_peaks, aes(x = peak_lag_ms)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 8, boundary = -40, fill = warm_mid, color = panel_fill, linewidth = 0.4) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = ink_color, linewidth = 0.6, linetype = "dashed") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(-40, 40, by = 20)) +
  labs(x = "Peak lag (ms)", y = "Patients") +
  validation_theme()

peak_width_plot <- ggplot(subject_peaks, aes(x = "Peak width", y = peak_width_ms)) +
  ggdist::stat_halfeye(
    fill = highlight_fill,
    color = warm_high,
    adjust = 0.8,
    width = 0.55,
    point_colour = NA
  ) +
  geom_boxplot(
    width = 0.14,
    outlier.shape = NA,
    fill = panel_fill,
    color = ink_color,
    linewidth = 0.5
  ) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.06, height = 0, color = scales::alpha(ink_color, 0.55), size = 1.7) +
  labs(x = "Distribution", y = "Peak width (ms)") +
  validation_theme() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_blank(), axis.ticks.x = element_blank())

lag_decomposition <- (
  lag_effect_plot +
  lag_overlay_plot +
  peak_lag_plot +
  peak_width_plot
) +
  plot_layout(ncol = 2) +
  plot_annotation(theme = theme(plot.background = element_rect(fill = bg_fill, color = NA)))

group_topography_plot <- build_topomap_plot(
  group_topomap_grid,
  group_topomap_values,
  facet_formula = ~ archetype_label,
  strip_text_size = 10.4
)

representative_topography_plot <- build_topomap_plot(
  representative_topomap_grid,
  representative_topomap_values,
  facet_formula = patient_display ~ archetype_label,
  strip_text_size = 9.6
)

conditioned_examples_plot <- build_topomap_plot(
  topomap_grid,
  topomap_values,
  facet_formula = patient_display ~ archetype_label,
  strip_text_size = 9.6
)

brain_theme <- function(base_size = 11) {
  theme_void(base_size = base_size) +
    theme(
      plot.background = element_rect(fill = bg_fill, color = NA),
      panel.background = element_rect(fill = panel_fill, color = NA),
      legend.background = element_rect(fill = bg_fill, color = NA),
      legend.key = element_rect(fill = panel_fill, color = NA),
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", color = ink_color),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(color = muted_color),
      legend.title = element_text(face = "bold", color = ink_color),
      legend.text = element_text(color = ink_color),
      plot.margin = margin(8, 8, 8, 8)
    )
}

touchpoint_data_root <- resolve_repo_path(params$data_root, must_exist = TRUE)
touchpoint_retained_patients <- sort(unique(as.character(yeo17_summary$patient_id)))
touchpoint_atlas_paths_all <- sort(list.files(touchpoint_data_root, pattern = "^Atlas\\.tsv$", recursive = TRUE, full.names = TRUE))
touchpoint_atlas_patient_ids <- vapply(
  touchpoint_atlas_paths_all,
  function(atlas_path) basename(dirname(dirname(atlas_path))),
  character(1)
)
touchpoint_atlas_paths <- touchpoint_atlas_paths_all[touchpoint_atlas_patient_ids %in% touchpoint_retained_patients]
if (length(touchpoint_atlas_paths) == 0) {
  stop(paste0("No retained-cohort Atlas.tsv files were found under: ", touchpoint_data_root))
}
missing_touchpoint_patients <- setdiff(touchpoint_retained_patients, touchpoint_atlas_patient_ids)
if (length(missing_touchpoint_patients) > 0) {
  stop(paste(
    "Missing Atlas.tsv for retained patients:",
    paste(missing_touchpoint_patients, collapse = ", ")
  ))
}

yeo17_touchpoint_mapping <- tibble(
  network = yeo17_levels,
  region = paste0("17Networks_", seq_along(yeo17_levels))
)

parse_touchpoint_label <- function(value) {
  normalized <- trimws(as.character(value))
  if (is.na(normalized) || !nzchar(normalized) || toupper(normalized) == "N/A") {
    return(list(network = NA_character_, hemi = NA_character_))
  }
  tokens <- strsplit(normalized, "\\s+")[[1]]
  if (length(tokens) == 0) {
    return(list(network = NA_character_, hemi = NA_character_))
  }
  network_token <- tokens[[1]]
  hemi_token <- if (length(tokens) > 1) tokens[[length(tokens)]] else NA_character_
  network <- sub("_.*$", "", network_token)
  hemi <- if (!is.na(hemi_token) && hemi_token %in% c("L", "R")) ifelse(hemi_token == "L", "lh", "rh") else NA_character_
  list(network = network, hemi = hemi)
}

parse_mni_triplet <- function(value) {
  normalized <- trimws(as.character(value))
  if (is.na(normalized) || !nzchar(normalized) || toupper(normalized) == "N/A") {
    return(c(NA_real_, NA_real_, NA_real_))
  }
  cleaned <- gsub("\\[|\\]", "", normalized)
  parts <- strsplit(cleaned, ",", fixed = TRUE)[[1]]
  if (length(parts) != 3) {
    return(c(NA_real_, NA_real_, NA_real_))
  }
  suppressWarnings(as.numeric(trimws(parts)))
}

stable_alias_table <- function(patient_ids) {
  ids <- sort(unique(as.character(patient_ids)))
  tibble(
    patient_id = ids,
    patient_alias = sprintf("sub-%02d", seq_along(ids))
  )
}

touchpoint_frames <- lapply(touchpoint_atlas_paths, function(atlas_path) {
  patient_id <- basename(dirname(dirname(atlas_path)))
  atlas_df <- read.csv(atlas_path, sep = "\t", stringsAsFactors = FALSE, check.names = FALSE)
  required_cols <- c("Channel", "MNI", "cortex_319663V:Schaefer_200_17net")
  missing_cols <- setdiff(required_cols, names(atlas_df))
  if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
    stop(paste("Missing columns in", atlas_path, ":", paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", ")))
  }

  parsed <- lapply(atlas_df[["cortex_319663V:Schaefer_200_17net"]], parse_touchpoint_label)
  network <- vapply(parsed, `[[`, character(1), "network")
  hemi <- vapply(parsed, `[[`, character(1), "hemi")
  mni_matrix <- t(vapply(atlas_df[["MNI"]], parse_mni_triplet, numeric(3)))

  tibble(
    patient_id = patient_id,
    channel = atlas_df[["Channel"]],
    raw_label = atlas_df[["cortex_319663V:Schaefer_200_17net"]],
    network = network,
    hemi = hemi,
    mni_x = mni_matrix[, 1],
    mni_y = mni_matrix[, 2],
    mni_z = mni_matrix[, 3]
  )
})

touchpoint_all <- bind_rows(touchpoint_frames) %>%
  mutate(patient_id = as.character(patient_id))

touchpoint_alias <- stable_alias_table(touchpoint_all$patient_id)
touchpoint_all <- touchpoint_all %>%
  left_join(touchpoint_alias, by = "patient_id")

touchpoint_yeo17_mapped <- touchpoint_all %>%
  filter(!is.na(network), network %in% yeo17_levels, !is.na(hemi)) %>%
  mutate(
    network = factor(network, levels = yeo17_levels),
    hemi = factor(hemi, levels = c("lh", "rh"))
  )

touchpoint_mni_mapped <- touchpoint_yeo17_mapped %>%
  filter(is.finite(mni_x), is.finite(mni_y), is.finite(mni_z))

if (nrow(touchpoint_yeo17_mapped) == 0) {
  stop("No Yeo17-mapped SEEG touchpoints were parsed from Atlas.tsv files.")
}
if (nrow(touchpoint_mni_mapped) == 0) {
  stop("No SEEG touchpoints had valid MNI coordinates after parsing Atlas.tsv files.")
}

load_standard_mni_brain_mask <- function() {
  nilearn_datasets <- reticulate::import("nilearn.datasets")
  mask_img <- nilearn_datasets$load_mni152_brain_mask(resolution = 2L)
  mask_data <- reticulate::py_to_r(mask_img$get_fdata())
  mask_affine <- reticulate::py_to_r(mask_img$affine)
  list(data = mask_data, affine = mask_affine)
}

standard_mni_mask <- load_standard_mni_brain_mask()

mask_projection_contours <- function(mask_data, affine, projection = c("axial", "coronal", "sagittal")) {
  projection <- match.arg(projection)
  x_coords <- affine[1, 4] + affine[1, 1] * seq(0, dim(mask_data)[1] - 1)
  y_coords <- affine[2, 4] + affine[2, 2] * seq(0, dim(mask_data)[2] - 1)
  z_coords <- affine[3, 4] + affine[3, 3] * seq(0, dim(mask_data)[3] - 1)
  plane <- switch(
    projection,
    axial = apply(mask_data > 0, c(1, 2), any),
    coronal = apply(mask_data > 0, c(1, 3), any),
    sagittal = apply(mask_data > 0, c(2, 3), any)
  )
  contour_data <- switch(
    projection,
    axial = contourLines(x_coords, y_coords, plane + 0, levels = 0.5),
    coronal = contourLines(x_coords, z_coords, plane + 0, levels = 0.5),
    sagittal = contourLines(y_coords, z_coords, plane + 0, levels = 0.5)
  )
  if (length(contour_data) == 0) {
    return(tibble(x = numeric(), y = numeric(), contour_id = integer()))
  }
  bind_rows(lapply(seq_along(contour_data), function(index) {
    contour <- contour_data[[index]]
    tibble(
      x = contour$x,
      y = contour$y,
      contour_id = index
    )
  }))
}

standard_mni_contours <- list(
  axial = mask_projection_contours(standard_mni_mask$data, standard_mni_mask$affine, "axial"),
  coronal = mask_projection_contours(standard_mni_mask$data, standard_mni_mask$affine, "coronal"),
  sagittal = mask_projection_contours(standard_mni_mask$data, standard_mni_mask$affine, "sagittal")
)

touchpoint_total_contacts <- nrow(touchpoint_all)
touchpoint_yeo17_contacts <- nrow(touchpoint_yeo17_mapped)
touchpoint_mni_contacts <- nrow(touchpoint_mni_mapped)
touchpoint_patient_count <- dplyr::n_distinct(touchpoint_all$patient_id)
touchpoint_mapped_fraction <- if (touchpoint_total_contacts > 0) {
  touchpoint_yeo17_contacts / touchpoint_total_contacts
} else {
  NA_real_
}

touchpoint_brain_summary <- touchpoint_yeo17_mapped %>%
  left_join(yeo17_touchpoint_mapping, by = "network") %>%
  filter(!is.na(region), !is.na(hemi)) %>%
  mutate(label = paste0(as.character(hemi), "_", region)) %>%
  group_by(label, hemi, network, region) %>%
  summarise(
    n_contacts = n(),
    n_patients = dplyr::n_distinct(patient_id),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

touchpoint_brain_summary <- tidyr::expand_grid(
  hemi = factor(c("lh", "rh"), levels = c("lh", "rh")),
  network = factor(yeo17_levels, levels = yeo17_levels)
) %>%
  left_join(yeo17_touchpoint_mapping, by = "network") %>%
  mutate(label = paste0(as.character(hemi), "_", region)) %>%
  left_join(
    touchpoint_brain_summary,
    by = c("label", "hemi", "network", "region")
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    n_contacts = tidyr::replace_na(n_contacts, 0L),
    n_patients = tidyr::replace_na(n_patients, 0L),
    hemi = factor(hemi, levels = c("lh", "rh")),
    network = factor(network, levels = yeo17_levels)
  ) %>%
  arrange(hemi, network)

touchpoint_brain_plot_data <- touchpoint_brain_summary %>%
  select(label, n_contacts)

touchpoint_network_summary <- touchpoint_yeo17_mapped %>%
  group_by(network) %>%
  summarise(
    n_contacts = n(),
    n_patients = dplyr::n_distinct(patient_id),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  tidyr::complete(
    network = factor(yeo17_levels, levels = yeo17_levels),
    fill = list(n_contacts = 0, n_patients = 0)
  ) %>%
  mutate(network = factor(network, levels = yeo17_levels)) %>%
  arrange(desc(n_contacts), network)

touchpoint_patient_summary <- touchpoint_all %>%
  group_by(patient_id, patient_alias) %>%
  summarise(
    total_contacts = n(),
    mapped_contacts = sum(network %in% yeo17_levels & !is.na(hemi)),
    mapped_fraction = ifelse(total_contacts > 0, mapped_contacts / total_contacts, NA_real_),
    n_networks = dplyr::n_distinct(network[!is.na(network)]),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(mapped_contacts), desc(n_networks), patient_id)

touchpoint_patient_order <- touchpoint_patient_summary$patient_alias
touchpoint_patient_network <- touchpoint_yeo17_mapped %>%
  count(patient_alias, network, name = "n_contacts") %>%
  tidyr::complete(
    patient_alias = touchpoint_patient_order,
    network = factor(yeo17_levels, levels = yeo17_levels),
    fill = list(n_contacts = 0)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    patient_alias = factor(patient_alias, levels = rev(touchpoint_patient_order)),
    network = factor(network, levels = yeo17_levels)
  )

touchpoint_fill_limit <- max(
  c(
    touchpoint_brain_summary$n_contacts,
    touchpoint_network_summary$n_contacts,
    touchpoint_patient_network$n_contacts
  ),
  na.rm = TRUE
)
if (!is.finite(touchpoint_fill_limit) || touchpoint_fill_limit <= 0) {
  touchpoint_fill_limit <- 1
}

touchpoint_brain_plot <- ggplot(touchpoint_brain_plot_data) +
  geom_brain(
    atlas = ggsegYeo2011::yeo17(),
    position = position_brain(hemi ~ view),
    aes(fill = n_contacts),
    colour = "grey35",
    size = 0.08
  ) +
  scale_fill_gradient(
    low = "#F7EFE2",
    high = warm_high,
    limits = c(0, touchpoint_fill_limit),
    oob = scales::squish,
    name = "Contacts"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Scheme 1. SEEG touchpoint density on the Yeo17 template",
    subtitle = sprintf(
      "%d patients | %d atlas rows | %d mapped Yeo17 touchpoints (%.1f%% mapped)",
      touchpoint_patient_count,
      touchpoint_total_contacts,
      touchpoint_yeo17_contacts,
      100 * touchpoint_mapped_fraction
    )
  ) +
  brain_theme()

build_mni_density_grid <- function(frame, x_col, y_col, grid_n = 120) {
  plot_df <- frame %>%
    select(x = all_of(x_col), y = all_of(y_col)) %>%
    filter(is.finite(x), is.finite(y))
  if (nrow(plot_df) < 2 || length(unique(plot_df$x)) < 2 || length(unique(plot_df$y)) < 2) {
    return(tibble(x = numeric(), y = numeric(), density = numeric()))
  }
  density <- MASS::kde2d(
    plot_df$x,
    plot_df$y,
    n = grid_n,
    lims = c(range(plot_df$x, na.rm = TRUE), range(plot_df$y, na.rm = TRUE))
  )
  density_grid <- tibble(
    x = rep(density$x, times = length(density$y)),
    y = rep(density$y, each = length(density$x))
  )
  density_grid$density <- as.vector(density$z)
  max_density <- max(density_grid$density, na.rm = TRUE)
  if (is.finite(max_density) && max_density > 0) {
    density_grid$density <- density_grid$density / max_density
  }
  density_grid
}

build_mni_projection_plot <- function(frame, x_col, y_col, x_label, y_label, title, show_legend = FALSE) {
  density_grid <- build_mni_density_grid(frame, x_col, y_col)
  ggplot() +
    geom_raster(
      data = density_grid,
      aes(x = x, y = y, fill = density),
      interpolate = TRUE
    ) +
    geom_contour(
      data = density_grid,
      aes(x = x, y = y, z = density),
      bins = 6,
      color = scales::alpha(ink_color, 0.30),
      linewidth = 0.18
    ) +
    geom_point(
      data = frame,
      aes(x = .data[[x_col]], y = .data[[y_col]]),
      color = scales::alpha(ink_color, 0.14),
      size = 0.34
    ) +
    scale_fill_gradient(
      low = panel_fill,
      high = hot_high,
      limits = c(0, 1),
      oob = scales::squish,
      name = "Relative\ndensity"
    ) +
    coord_equal(expand = FALSE) +
    labs(title = title, x = x_label, y = y_label) +
    validation_theme() +
    geom_path(
      data = switch(
        title,
        "Axial" = standard_mni_contours$axial,
        "Coronal" = standard_mni_contours$coronal,
        "Sagittal" = standard_mni_contours$sagittal,
        standard_mni_contours$axial
      ),
      aes(x = x, y = y, group = contour_id),
      inherit.aes = FALSE,
      color = ink_color,
      linewidth = 0.45,
      lineend = "round"
    ) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", color = ink_color, size = rel(1.02)),
      plot.title.position = "plot"
    ) +
    theme(legend.position = if (show_legend) "bottom" else "none")
}

touchpoint_mni_axial <- build_mni_projection_plot(
  touchpoint_mni_mapped,
  "mni_x",
  "mni_y",
  "MNI X (mm)",
  "MNI Y (mm)",
  "Axial",
  show_legend = TRUE
)

touchpoint_mni_coronal <- build_mni_projection_plot(
  touchpoint_mni_mapped,
  "mni_x",
  "mni_z",
  "MNI X (mm)",
  "MNI Z (mm)",
  "Coronal"
)

touchpoint_mni_sagittal <- build_mni_projection_plot(
  touchpoint_mni_mapped,
  "mni_y",
  "mni_z",
  "MNI Y (mm)",
  "MNI Z (mm)",
  "Sagittal"
)

touchpoint_mni_plot <- (
  touchpoint_mni_axial +
  touchpoint_mni_coronal +
  touchpoint_mni_sagittal +
  plot_layout(nrow = 1)
) +
  plot_annotation(
    title = "Scheme 2. SEEG touchpoint density in MNI space",
    subtitle = sprintf(
      "%d mapped Yeo17 touchpoints shown as normalized density projections",
      touchpoint_mni_contacts
    ),
    theme = theme(plot.background = element_rect(fill = bg_fill, color = NA))
  )

touchpoint_network_bar <- ggplot(
  touchpoint_network_summary,
  aes(x = reorder(network, -n_contacts), y = n_contacts, fill = n_contacts)
) +
  geom_col(width = 0.72, color = panel_fill, linewidth = 0.35) +
  geom_text(aes(label = n_contacts), hjust = -0.10, color = ink_color, size = 3.0) +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_fill_gradient(
    low = "#F7EFE2",
    high = warm_high,
    limits = c(0, touchpoint_fill_limit),
    oob = scales::squish,
    name = "Contacts"
  ) +
  expand_limits(y = touchpoint_fill_limit * 1.03) +
  labs(x = "Yeo17 network", y = "Touchpoints") +
  validation_theme() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

touchpoint_patient_heatmap <- ggplot(
  touchpoint_patient_network,
  aes(x = network, y = patient_alias, fill = n_contacts)
) +
  geom_tile(color = scales::alpha(grid_color, 0.85), linewidth = 0.35) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = ifelse(n_contacts > 0, n_contacts, "")),
    color = ink_color,
    size = 2.45
  ) +
  scale_fill_gradient(
    low = "#F7EFE2",
    high = warm_high,
    limits = c(0, touchpoint_fill_limit),
    oob = scales::squish,
    name = "Contacts"
  ) +
  labs(x = "Yeo17 network", y = "Patient") +
  validation_theme() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = rel(0.80)),
    legend.position = "none"
  )

touchpoint_right_panel <- (
  touchpoint_network_bar /
  touchpoint_patient_heatmap
) +
  plot_layout(heights = c(0.75, 1.25))

touchpoint_overview_plot <- (
  touchpoint_brain_plot |
    touchpoint_right_panel
) +
  plot_layout(widths = c(1.05, 1.10)) +
  plot_annotation(
    title = "Scheme 3. SEEG touchpoint overview",
    subtitle = sprintf(
      "%d patients | %d total atlas rows | %d mapped Yeo17 touchpoints | %d/%d networks covered",
      touchpoint_patient_count,
      touchpoint_total_contacts,
      touchpoint_yeo17_contacts,
      sum(touchpoint_network_summary$n_contacts > 0),
      length(yeo17_levels)
    ),
    theme = theme(plot.background = element_rect(fill = bg_fill, color = NA))
  )

yeo17_path <- file.path(output_dir, paste0(output_stem, "_yeo17_cohort_characterization.svg"))
transition_path <- file.path(output_dir, paste0(output_stem, "_field_state_transition_matrix.svg"))
repro_path <- file.path(output_dir, paste0(output_stem, "_field_state_reproducibility.svg"))
support_path <- file.path(output_dir, paste0(output_stem, "_archetype_support_and_null.svg"))
model_order_path <- file.path(output_dir, paste0(output_stem, "_field_state_model_order_validation.svg"))
lag_path <- file.path(output_dir, paste0(output_stem, "_lag_decomposition.svg"))
group_topo_path <- file.path(output_dir, paste0(output_stem, "_conditioned_eeg_group_topographies.svg"))
rep_topo_path <- file.path(output_dir, paste0(output_stem, "_conditioned_eeg_representative_subjects.svg"))
combined_topo_path <- file.path(output_dir, paste0(output_stem, "_conditioned_eeg_examples.svg"))
touchpoint_brain_path <- file.path(output_dir, paste0(output_stem, "_seeg_touchpoint_yeo17_density.svg"))
touchpoint_mni_path <- file.path(output_dir, paste0(output_stem, "_seeg_touchpoint_mni_density.svg"))
touchpoint_overview_path <- file.path(output_dir, paste0(output_stem, "_seeg_touchpoint_overview.svg"))

save_svg(yeo17_combined, yeo17_path, width = 15.2, height = 8.4)
save_svg(transition_plot, transition_path, width = 6.4, height = 5.6)
save_svg(model_order_plot, model_order_path, width = 11.4, height = 4.8)
save_svg(support_plot + assignment_null_plot + plot_layout(widths = c(0.92, 1.08)), support_path, width = 11.2, height = 4.9)
save_svg(field_state_reproducibility, repro_path, width = 13.8, height = 9.6)
save_svg(lag_decomposition, lag_path, width = 13.0, height = 8.9)
save_svg(group_topography_plot, group_topo_path, width = 10.8, height = 3.5)
save_svg(representative_topography_plot, rep_topo_path, width = 10.8, height = 7.6)
save_svg(conditioned_examples_plot, combined_topo_path, width = 10.8, height = 9.9)
save_svg(touchpoint_brain_plot, touchpoint_brain_path, width = 11.2, height = 7.4)
save_svg(touchpoint_mni_plot, touchpoint_mni_path, width = 14.2, height = 5.3)
save_svg(touchpoint_overview_plot, touchpoint_overview_path, width = 14.4, height = 10.2)

figure_manifest <- tibble(
  figure_output = c(
    "yeo17_cohort_characterization",
    "field_state_transition_matrix",
    "field_state_model_order_validation",
    "archetype_support_and_null",
    "field_state_reproducibility",
    "lag_decomposition",
    "conditioned_eeg_group_topographies",
    "conditioned_eeg_representative_subjects",
    "conditioned_eeg_examples",
    "seeg_touchpoint_yeo17_density",
    "seeg_touchpoint_mni_density",
    "seeg_touchpoint_overview"
  ),
  file_name = basename(c(
    yeo17_path,
    transition_path,
    model_order_path,
    support_path,
    repro_path,
    lag_path,
    group_topo_path,
    rep_topo_path,
    combined_topo_path,
    touchpoint_brain_path,
    touchpoint_mni_path,
    touchpoint_overview_path
  )),
  path = normalizePath(c(
    yeo17_path,
    transition_path,
    model_order_path,
    support_path,
    repro_path,
    lag_path,
    group_topo_path,
    rep_topo_path,
    combined_topo_path,
    touchpoint_brain_path,
    touchpoint_mni_path,
    touchpoint_overview_path
  ), winslash = "/", mustWork = FALSE)
)

write.csv(
  figure_manifest,
  file.path(output_dir, paste0(output_stem, "_figure_manifest.csv")),
  row.names = FALSE
)
```
